chunks.text:
AI Maturity Index | What the AI Maturity Index Is
The AI Maturity Index is a self-serve diagnostic that scores your company across an eight-pillar framework. It gives leaders an honest, structured read on where the organization stands today and where the biggest gaps and opportunities are. Instead of guessing whether you are "behind" or "ahead," you get a clear picture across the dimensions that actually determine AI success.

meta.title: AI Maturity Index
meta.section: What the AI Maturity Index Is

chunks.text:
AI Maturity Index | The Eight Pillars
The Index evaluates your organization across eight pillars:

1. **Dedicated AI Team** — whether you have people clearly accountable for driving AI forward.
2. **AI Command Center** — a single, company-wide LLM platform rather than scattered, ad hoc tools.
3. **AI-First Culture Shift** — how deeply AI thinking is embraced across the organization.
4. **AI-Enabled Tech Stack** — API access across core systems such as your CRM and ERP.
5. **AI-Healthy Data Assessment** — the quality of your data, because garbage in means garbage out.
6. **AI Agent Readiness** — readiness to run agents as digital employees, with SOPs and monitoring in place.
7. **Departmental Deep Dives** — how AI opportunity and adoption look within each department.
8. **Three-Year AI Vision** — whether you have a forward-looking plan for where AI takes the business.

Scoring across all eight pillars shows not just an overall level of maturity but exactly which areas to strengthen first.

AI Maturity Index | Start Free: The Cadre 360 AI Assessment
If you want a guided starting point, our entry offer is the free **Cadre 360 AI Assessment**. At zero cost, it maps your business and surfaces the opportunities where AI can deliver real value. It is the fastest way to move from a general sense that you "should be doing more with AI" to a concrete set of next steps.

meta.title: AI Maturity Index
meta.section: Start Free: The Cadre 360 AI Assessment

chunks.text:
AI Maturity Index | Turning the Score Into a Plan
The Index and the Cadre 360 AI Assessment are designed to feed directly into action. Once you know where you stand across the eight pillars, our team can help you prioritize the gaps, sequence the work, and build toward a higher level of AI maturity over time.

meta.title: AI Maturity Index
meta.section: Turning the Score Into a Plan

chunks.text:
Book a Strategy Call | Talk to an AI Strategist
The best way to get started with Cadre AI is to talk to a real strategist about your goals. Whether you are exploring your first use case or ready to build, a short conversation helps us understand your business and point you toward the right next step.

Use the **Talk to an AI Strategist** (also shown as **Talk to an AI Expert**) call to action on our site, which takes you to our **/contact** page. You can also reach us directly by email at **hello@gocadre.ai**.

Book a Strategy Call | What to Expect
A strategy call is a working conversation, not a hard sell. We will ask about your current workflows, where AI might create leverage, and what success would look like for your teams. From there we can recommend a starting point, which is often the free assessment, a focused engagement, or our 45-Day AI Strategy Intensive.

Book a Strategy Call | Start Free Before You Commit
If you would rather explore on your own first, we offer two free entry points:

- **Cadre 360 AI Assessment** — a free, guided assessment that maps your business and surfaces opportunities at zero cost.
- **AI Maturity Index** — a self-serve diagnostic that scores your company across an eight-pillar framework.

Both give you a concrete starting point and make any follow-up conversation far more productive.

Book a Strategy Call | How to Reach Us
- Visit the **/contact** page via the Talk to an AI Strategist button.
- Email **hello@gocadre.ai**.
- Or start with the free Cadre 360 AI Assessment and take it from there.

Whichever path you choose, a member of our team can help you turn interest into a clear plan.

Client Portal Access | The Cadre Client Portal
Cadre AI provides a centralized client portal for the organizations we work with. It gives you a single place to see your AI program in one view, rather than tracking progress across scattered documents and tools.

Client Portal Access | What the Portal Tracks
Inside the portal, clients can track:

- **Tools** — the AI tools and platforms in use across your organization.
- **Agents** — the AI agents deployed for your teams and the work they handle.
- **Training** — leadership and team training progress and enablement.
- **Results** — the outcomes and impact of your AI initiatives over time.

Bringing these together keeps everyone aligned on what has been built, who is using it, and what value it is delivering.

Client Portal Access | For Existing Clients
If you are already working with Cadre AI, the portal is where your engagement lives day to day. If you need access or credentials for yourself or a teammate, reach out to your Cadre contact and we will get you set up.

Client Portal Access | Requesting Access
Portal access is provided to active clients. If you are new to Cadre AI and would like access, the first step is to get in touch so we can understand your needs and begin an engagement. You can reach us through the **Talk to an AI Strategist** call to action on our **/contact** page, or by email at **hello@gocadre.ai**. Our team will help you with next steps and portal access from there.

FAQ & Getting Help | What does Cadre AI do?
Cadre AI is a San Diego based applied-AI consultancy that acts as your integrated AI team, providing strategy, implementation, training, and ongoing management. Our tagline is From AI Confusion to AI Confidence.

FAQ & Getting Help | How do I get started?
The easiest way is to start with the free **Cadre 360 AI Assessment**, or to talk to a strategist directly. You can also take the self-serve **AI Maturity Index** to see where your organization stands across an eight-pillar framework.

FAQ & Getting Help | What services can I engage Cadre for?
We offer four core services: AI Strategy (delivered as a 45-Day Intensive), AI Leadership and Facilitation, AI Engineering, and AI Agents. You can engage us for one service or as your end-to-end AI partner.

meta.title: FAQ & Getting Help
meta.section: What services can I engage Cadre for?

chunks.text:
FAQ & Getting Help | Which AI models do you work with?
We are model-agnostic and help you select the right fit. We work across OpenAI GPT, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Meta Llama, Mistral, and open-source models.

meta.title: FAQ & Getting Help
meta.section: Which AI models do you work with?

chunks.text:
FAQ & Getting Help | How Much Does It Cost?
Cadre AI does not publish pricing. Every engagement is scoped to the specific goals, workflows, and complexity of the client, so there is no one-size-fits-all number. The right way to get pricing is to talk to a strategist, who can understand your needs and put together a scope that fits.

A good, no-cost first step is the free **Cadre 360 AI Assessment**. It helps clarify what you actually need, which makes any conversation about scope and investment far more grounded.

FAQ & Getting Help | Talking to a Human
If you would like to speak with a real person on our team, we are easy to reach:

- Use the **Talk to an AI Strategist** call to action, which takes you to our **/contact** page.
- Email us directly at **hello@gocadre.ai**.

Whether you have a detailed question, want to discuss a project, or just are not sure where to begin, a member of the Cadre team is happy to help.

FAQ & Getting Help | When to Escalate
Reach out to a strategist or email **hello@gocadre.ai** whenever you need pricing, want a scoped proposal, have a question specific to your business, or are ready to move from exploring to building. For a free starting point, the **Cadre 360 AI Assessment** is always available.

Industries We Serve | Industries We Work With
Cadre AI applies AI where it produces measurable business outcomes, and we tailor that work to the realities of each industry. We regularly partner with organizations across:

- **Professional Services** — automating research, drafting, and client delivery workflows.
- **Private Equity** — accelerating diligence, portfolio monitoring, and deal sourcing.
- **Real Estate** — streamlining underwriting, listings, and transaction workflows.
- **Financial Services** — supporting analysis, reporting, and client communication.
- **Mortgage and Lending** — reducing manual work across origination and servicing.
- **Construction** — improving estimating, project coordination, and documentation.
- **Retail and E-commerce** — enhancing merchandising, support, and customer experience.
- **Manufacturing and Logistics** — optimizing planning, operations, and the supply chain.
- **Hospitality** — elevating guest experience and back-of-house efficiency.

Each engagement starts from the workflows and constraints specific to your sector, not a generic template.

Industries We Serve | How We Organize Work by Department
Applied AI rarely lives in one corner of a business. We also structure our work by department so that the right teams adopt the right tools:

- **Sales** — prospecting, outreach, and pipeline support.
- **Marketing** — content creation, campaign workflows, and analysis.
- **Customer Success** — support automation, knowledge access, and response quality.
- **Executive Leadership** — decision support and strategic visibility.
- **Finance** — reporting, reconciliation, and forecasting support.
- **Operations** — process automation and workflow orchestration.
- **Technology** — engineering enablement and system integration.
- **Legal** — document review, drafting, and research assistance.

meta.title: Industries We Serve
meta.section: How We Organize Work by Department

chunks.text:
Industries We Serve | Outcomes Over Hype
Whatever the industry or department, our focus stays the same: identify where AI can remove friction, build solutions your teams actually use, and measure the impact. We prioritize opportunities with a clear return, then expand from proven wins rather than chasing every trend at once.

LLM Selection & Data Security | Model-Agnostic by Design
Cadre AI is model-agnostic. We are not tied to any single vendor, so we help clients select and configure the LLM or LLMs that best align with your tech stack and business goals. The right choice depends on your workflows, your data, your budget for compute, and the tradeoffs you care about, and we make that call with you rather than for a vendor.

We work across the leading models, including:

- **OpenAI GPT**
- **Anthropic Claude**
- **Google Gemini**
- **Meta Llama**
- **Mistral**
- Plus a range of open-source models

Because we are neutral on models, we can mix and match where it makes sense and change course as the landscape evolves.

LLM Selection & Data Security | The AI Command Center
A common risk in growing companies is shadow AI: employees pasting sensitive information into personal ChatGPT or Claude accounts with no oversight. That scatters data across accounts no one controls and creates real exposure.

Our approach is to consolidate that usage into a governed **AI Command Center**, a single, company-wide LLM platform. Bringing AI use into one managed environment gives your organization visibility and control, while still giving employees the capabilities they need to do their work.

LLM Selection & Data Security | How We Approach Your Data
Within the AI Command Center, we emphasize secure, compliant tools and sound data practices. A core principle is to black-box your data so that it is never used to train other models. Your proprietary information stays yours.

This is how we approach data protection in the work we deliver. We are describing our practices and philosophy here, not claiming any formal certification.

LLM Selection & Data Security | Governance That Enables, Not Blocks
Good governance should make AI safer to use, not harder. By consolidating tools, setting clear guardrails, and keeping your data walled off from external model training, we help you expand AI adoption with confidence instead of restricting it out of fear.

Our Services | An Integrated AI Team
Cadre AI offers four core services that work together to take a company from strategy through execution and adoption. You can engage us for a single service or as your end-to-end AI partner.

Our Services | AI Strategy
Our AI Strategy service is delivered as a **45-Day Intensive** that takes clients from zero clarity to a prioritized roadmap. In a focused, time-boxed engagement, we map your business, surface the highest-value opportunities, and sequence them into a plan your leadership can act on. You leave with a clear view of where to start, what to expect, and how the pieces connect.

Our Services | AI Leadership and Facilitation
AI adoption is as much about people as technology. Our AI Leadership and Facilitation service provides executive and team training backed by behavioral science. We help leaders build fluency, align their teams, and create the conditions for lasting behavior change, so new tools translate into new habits rather than shelfware.

Our Services | AI Engineering
Our AI Engineering service covers automation, workflow orchestration, and custom AI agents. We build the systems that put your roadmap into production and connect them to the tools your teams already use.

We right-size every solution. That means knowing when to buy, when to automate, and when to build custom. Often a lightweight tool paired with smart automation beats months of bespoke development, and we will tell you when that is the better call. We map the process before selecting tools, and we hold to a validation culture: done means adopted. We instrument observability into what we ship and run 30, 60, and 90-day check-ins to confirm the solution is being used and delivering value.

Our Services | AI Agents
Our AI Agents service builds autonomous workers that handle your most complex tasks. These agents operate as digital teammates, taking on multi-step work with the standard operating procedures and monitoring needed to run reliably in your environment.

Our Services | How Onboarding Works: Find. Prepare. Implement.
Engagements follow a simple, repeatable methodology:

- **Find** — identify the opportunities where AI creates the most leverage.
- **Prepare** — get your data, tools, and teams ready for what comes next.
- **Implement** — deploy, adopt, and measure, then expand from proven wins.

This keeps the work grounded in outcomes at every step, from the first assessment to live results.

meta.title: Our Services
meta.section: How Onboarding Works: Find. Prepare. Implement.

chunks.text:
What Cadre AI Does | Who We Are
Cadre AI is a San Diego based applied-AI consultancy. We work as an integrated AI team for the companies we serve, providing strategy, implementation, training, and ongoing management under one roof. Our tagline says it plainly: **From AI Confusion to AI Confidence.**

Most organizations feel the pressure to "do something with AI" but lack a clear path from experiments to results. We exist to close that gap, so companies don't simply let AI happen to them.

What Cadre AI Does | Our Mission and Positioning
We believe the AI winners will be the ones with a plan, not the ones with the most tools. Buying another subscription or piloting another chatbot rarely moves the needle on its own. What moves the needle is a prioritized roadmap, the right models and workflows, and a team that stays accountable for adoption.

Rather than hand you a slide deck and walk away, we embed alongside your people. We help you decide where AI creates real leverage, build the automations and agents that deliver it, train your teams to use them, and manage the results over time. That end-to-end model is what turns confusion into confidence.

What Cadre AI Does | Who Runs Cadre
Cadre AI was built by a founding team spanning strategy, engineering, and AI leadership:

- **Grayson Lafrenz** — Founder and CEO
- **Riley Stricklin** — Founder and Chief Strategy Officer
- **Chad Lohrli** — Founder and Chief AI Officer
- **Ben Shapiro** — Co-Founder and Head of AI Strategy

The wider leadership team includes **Keith Jensen** (President), **Nicole Kelley** (CFO), and **Sarah McLoughlin** (Chief Client Officer).

What Cadre AI Does | The Cadre Way
Our values guide how we show up for clients and each other:

- **Growth Mindset** — we aim to be 1% better every day.
- **Extreme Ownership** — we own the problem, the solution, and the outcome.
- **Team First** — we put the collective result ahead of individual credit.
- **Scrappy** — we move fast, stay resourceful, and find a way to deliver.

Together these values keep us focused on outcomes our clients can feel, not activity for its own sake.
